description: This file serves as the main entry point for the Business Loan API Spring Boot application. It includes Spring Boot application setup, OpenAPI (Swagger) documentation annotations, and tags defining different API groups.

classes.name: BusinessLoanAPISpringBootApplication
classes.description: Main class annotated with SpringBootApplication and OpenAPI/Swagger annotations, serving as the entry point for the application.

methods.name: main
methods.description: Standard Java main method which launches the Spring Boot application.
